CheckTitle: Ensure compliant or managed device is required for admin access
Description: Verifies that at least one enabled CA policy requires a compliant or hybrid-joined device for privileged admin roles.
Risk: Without device compliance requirements, compromised admin credentials can be used from any unmanaged device, including attacker-controlled machines.

Remediation.Recommendation: Create a CA policy targeting admin roles that requires a compliant or hybrid Azure AD joined device.

SourceNotes: AI-generated framework mappings — verify before citing in compliance reports.
